description: Slip your feet into cosy comfort and look stylish effortlessly in this pair of black socks from manchester united. Engineered with arch support and offering a secure stable Fit, this pair offers exemplary comfort. Made of a blended fabric for long lasting comfort Has a half cushion terry foot for shock absorption Inner arch support for a secure and stable fit Branding printed on and below the ribbed mouth Care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry, iron or dry clean
